name: claude
description:
Claude bridge for Codex.

Aliases: @claude, claude, Claude, Anthropic Claude.

Use Claude when the user asks to delegate a coding task, code review, debugging investigation, or long-running implementation work to Anthropic's Claude model. Routes through the local `claude` CLI on the same machine.

For requests like "have Claude review this", "ask Claude to fix the failing test", "get a second opinion from Claude", "is Claude up?", or "check Claude", invoke the matching skill in this plugin (claude-setup, claude-review, claude-rescue, claude-status, claude-result, claude-cancel, claude-adversarial-review).

Do not satisfy explicit Claude requests by writing your own `claude --version`, `claude -p ...` shell commands, or by attempting the task with Codex itself unless the user approves a fallback.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate reviews and tasks to Claude from inside Codex
interface.longDescription: Claude lets Codex hand off code reviews, debugging investigations, and substantial coding tasks to Anthropic's Claude model via the local `claude` CLI. Includes background job tracking, resume support, and an adversarial-review mode for pre-ship pressure testing.
defaultPrompt: Have Claude review my uncommitted changes
Ask Claude to investigate why the tests are failing
Run an adversarial Claude review against main
